educations.school_name: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang

description: Developed a FastAPI backend for news analysis, using embeddings to assess credibility and detect fake news.
Built a chatbot that analyzes user-submitted news and provides real-time fake news verification.
Collaborated in a startup developing AI-based health risk assessment technology and a telemedicine platform.
Acted as a company representative in meetings, delivering presentations on technology solutions.
Coordinated testing and validation, ensuring compliance with industry standards.
Tested web application functionality to ensure compliance with defined standards.
Reported system issues and defects to the development team for further improvement.
